derivation.method: Python filter; edges where both endpoints under contracts/* (intra), one endpoint (inbound/outbound).

note: contracts/ is layer L0; the L3 import graph is L3-only by construction. Empty intra/outbound is the architectural evidence the L0 leaf invariant holds at the L3 boundary. Inbound count reflects how many L3 nodes import from contracts/ at the L3 graph resolution.
